title: Joby Aviation Inc (JOBY) Q3 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Expect
text: Joby Aviation is scheduled to announce Q3 2024 earnings on November 6, 2024. The company is anticipated to report quarterly revenue of $0.04 million with a loss of $0.19 per share. For the complete 2024 fiscal year, analysts expect total revenue of $0.4 million and earnings of -$0.71 per share. Eight brokerage firms currently rate the stock with a Hold recommendation. Wall Street analysts have set an average 12-month price target of $7.68, representing potential upside of approximately 52%. Price targets range from $4 to $10 per share. Over the past 90 days, full-year 2025 revenue forecasts declined from $59.71 million to $32.74 million. However, earnings projections improved slightly from -$0.86 to -$0.79 per share for 2025. In Q2 2024, Joby reported $0.03 million in revenue, significantly missing expectations.
